tools.name: get_health
tools.description: Check Moltalyzer API health and service status — returns overall status (ok/degraded), active job statuses, and x402 facilitator connectivity. Free, no payment or API key required.

tools.name: get_api_info
tools.description: Get Moltalyzer API overview — all available endpoints, pricing per call, recent changelog, and rate limits. Use this to discover what tools and data feeds are available. Free, no payment or API key required.

tools.name: get_intelligence_sample
tools.description: Get a free sample of the Master Intelligence Digest — a cross-domain synthesis combining crypto community sentiment, GitHub trending repos, Polymarket prediction signals, token intelligence, BTC derivatives, Fear & Greed index, and macro data. Generated every 4 hours. Rate limited to 1 request per 20 minutes. No payment or API key required. To get live data, use get_intelligence_digest ($0.01 via x402) or sign up for a free API key at https://moltalyzer.xyz.

tools.name: get_moltbook_sample
tools.description: Get a free sample of the Moltbook community digest — AI-generated analysis of crypto community sentiment, trending topics, emerging narratives, and hot discussions. Updated hourly. Rate limited to 1 request per 20 minutes. No payment or API key required. To get live data, use get_moltbook_digest ($0.005 via x402) or sign up for a free API key at https://moltalyzer.xyz.
